sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n75202" key="o)rneo/foitos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὀρνεό-φοιτος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n75202.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">frequented by birds,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">AP</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">10.11</biblScope> </bibl> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Satyr.</author> </bibl>).</sense> </entryFree>
